name: Assisted Transport
recent_news: No web presence located; (850) area code = FL Panhandle. Likely a small NEMT/paratransit operator rather than yellow-bus school contractor.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~46 EE, ~$2.9M rev) with no confirmed school-district contracts. Likely NEMT/paratransit rather than yellow-bus; low priority for Summit tuck-in unless verified as school operator.

name: Hayden Anderson Transit System
districts_or_customers: Anderson Community Schools (primary); private charter and event transportation
recent_news: Website self-describes as 'private fleet contractor that transports students for Anderson Community Schools' with multiple special-needs school buses. No M&A news located.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned IN school-bus contractor with single-district anchor (Anderson Community Schools) plus SPED capability - classic Summit tuck-in profile in Indiana expansion footprint.

name: Call-A-Ride Plus
recent_news: No standalone web presence; not to be confused with Metro Call-A-Ride (Bi-State Development's paratransit). MO NEMT brokered by MTM Health.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~29 EE, ~$2.1M rev) STL operator; no confirmed school-district contracts. Likely NEMT/wheelchair van rather than yellow-bus; low Summit fit unless validated as school SPED contractor.

name: Medi-Van Of Green Bay
districts_or_customers: Brown County / Green Bay medical & disability transport users; not confirmed school district contractor
recent_news: Categorized as Handicapped Transportation Services; est. $1-2.5M revenue per Manta. WI Medicaid NEMT brokered by MTM/Modivcare.
fit_notes: Small WI NEMT/wheelchair-van operator, not a yellow-bus school contractor; outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis. Skip unless Summit expands SPED-via-van capability into WI.

name: Essential Transportation LLC
recent_news: No website confirmed at Poughkeepsie address (3 Neptune Rd is also Dutchess County Emergency Response complex - possible suite/co-tenant). The school-bus 'essentialtransportations.com' is a separate North Carolina operator (Wake/Durham/Orange counties, 26+ vehicles), NOT this NY LLC.
fit_notes: Small (~31 EE, ~$1.6M rev) Poughkeepsie operator; no confirmed school-district contracts and likely NEMT/paratransit. Low Summit fit absent confirmation as yellow-bus or SPED contractor in Hudson Valley.
